description: tried to grasp a wide object (tape roll) with a side approach, but the object was too wide to fit between the fingers. Need to approach from above so fingers can close top-to-bottom on the tape roll.

bad_example.what_happened: Robot arrived at tape with gripper already closed. Could not grasp.

correct_pattern.rule: STAGE_GRIPPER_ACTION[0] must always be open. Approach stage always comes first.
